sections_cited: Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 6541 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For order on Misc. No.27737/2022 2) For hearing of Misc. No.27738/2022 3) For hearing of main case 20.01.2025 Ms. Ghazala Rafiq, Advocate for Petitioners. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General __________ Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent. Through this Petition, the Petitioner has challenged the vires of Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. It appears that this Court has already decided this controversy vide Judgment dated 28.10.2022 passed in C. P. No. D-4614 of 2022 & other connected matters, whereby, the Petitions stand dismissed. Accordingly, in view of above, this Petition is dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid Judgment dated 28.10.2022 passed in C. P. No. D-4614 of 2022 and other connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
